Blog
Hospitality

Hotel guest WiFi that builds loyalty from the first login.

Hotels, restaurants, pubs, and cafes already pay for WiFi. Purple turns it into a branded loyalty engine and a zero-risk staff network, with a branded captive portal capturing every first-time guest and the Purple app keeping returning guests reconnecting without friction.

Branded captive portal live in days, not months
Every login becomes a consented, reachable contact
Returning guests reconnect automatically through the app
The conversation

What your customer is dealing with right now.

Staff turnover means old WiFi credentials are still floating around

Housekeeping, F&B, front desk, when someone leaves, their hotel WiFi access goes with them. No IT ticket needed. Each role gets the right access from day one, and directory sync means leavers are locked out automatically, no manual process, no security gap.

Guest WiFi that's just a login screen, not a loyalty tool

A branded portal isn't just a login screen. It's where guests join the rewards programme, leave a review, and get upsold on F&B, automatically, every stay. Business travellers and leisure guests connect once and stay connected throughout their stay.

Data that never reaches a usable database

Even when a venue captures an email at login, a meaningful share of those addresses are fake or mistyped. Verify checks every email in real time so the database a customer builds is one they can actually use.

Where Purple fits

The products that solve it.

GUEST WIFI
A loyalty engine, not just a login screen

Branded portal or seamless connection via the Purple app, with every login routed straight into the rewards programme and F&B upsells. The unseen marketing channel every venue already owns.

Branded captive portal or seamless connection
VERIFY
Real, reachable guest data

Even when a venue captures an email at login, a meaningful share are fake or mistyped. Verify checks every address in real time, so the database a venue builds is one it can actually use.

Real-time validation at login
STAFF WIFI
Zero-trust access for every shift

WPA3-Enterprise with automatic provisioning and revocation tied to the venue's identity provider. Housekeeping, F&B, and front desk each get the right access from day one, no shared passwords, no manual IT overhead.

Works with Entra ID, Google & Okta
Powered by the Purple app

Every login in hospitality runs through the same app.

Whichever product opens the deal, staff sign-in, a guest's first connection, or a resident provisioning their network, it all happens in the same Purple app. That's one engine to explain, one experience to demo, and one channel that keeps paying off after the first login.

Proof points

Real results from partners in hospitality.

3 case studies from real hospitality deployments, each with its own numbers.

Pizza Express UAE
Hospitality & leisure
The rollout let the marketing team collect real customer data and social logins, driving measurable engagement and revenue gains.
52%
increase in Facebook likes in a month
Pizza Express
Hospitality & leisure
The network captured demographic and behavioural data and supported marketing campaigns, including prize draws, app-download promos, and free-pizza offers.
470+
restaurants
McDonald's Belgium
Hospitality & leisure
The rollout captured millions of unique users in the CRM and sharply cut the need for IT engineers to visit sites physically.
80
restaurants
"Purple's solution is integral to our overall business strategies. It lets us tailor the user's journey by venue and collect valuable, rich data that would otherwise have been unknown to the business, driving visits with tailored communications and an ROI that pays for the software itself, and then some."
ST
Stonegate Pub Company
CRM Manager
Marketing support
